---
name: Feature request / schema change
about: Propose a new feature, primitive, or change to the UHD data model
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Cite a real use case — a domain (electrical / mechanical / pneumatic / firmware), a class of components, or a workflow that UHD currently can't express well.

## Proposal

Describe the change. If it touches the data model (`Module`, `Interface`, `Harness`, `Protocol`, `Capability`, `Parameter`, `Trait`, etc.), include a sketch of the type signatures.

```typescript
// proposed types or API
```

## Example

How would a user write this? A small fixture or snippet showing the new feature in use.

```typescript
// example usage
```

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve this problem and why they fall short.

## Compatibility

- Does this break existing UHD definitions?  yes / no
- Does this require a migration?  yes / no
- If yes to either, what does the migration look like?

## Additional context

Links to prior art (Verilog, USD, faebryk, atopile, etc.), related issues, or design notes.
